info.title: Spriggit.Yaml.Skyrim
info.description:
2024
deserialize, create-plugin, convert-to-plugin    Converts a mod from its text
based representation to a
binary Bethesda plugin
serialize, convert-from-plugin                   Converts a binary Bethesda
plugin to a text based
representation
help                                             Display more information on a
specific command.
version                                          Display version information.
